args.name: WhatsApp Repeat — cake "Napoleon" pickup
args.objective: Re-activate prior buyers via WhatsApp broadcast with a same-day pickup nudge, capturing the warm intent already visible in 41 GMB call clicks.
args.offer: Fresh cake "Napoleon" ready for pickup this afternoon — tender, honest, baked today. Order on the site at happycake.us or send a message on WhatsApp.
args.targetAudience: Past HappyCake customers who messaged on WhatsApp in the last 90 days

args.approvalNote: Office boxes lead — campaignHint match; high $72 contribution per box.
Family weekend ritual — required family/celebration campaign.
WhatsApp re-engagement — cheapest channel, warm list.

args.reason: Intent "birthday cake for Saturday" at $95 — custom cake requires owner sign-off per policy.
Office box for 12 — needs delivery window + invoice; WhatsApp is the fastest concierge path.
Honey cake pickup today is a ready-made line item — direct to happycake.us cart.
Custom birthday cake intent — owner approves all custom decoration work.
Lead arrived from Instagram channel asking about an office box; reply in-thread on IG DM where the trust started.
Same-day pickup of cake "Honey" — site checkout is the lowest-friction conversion.
Birthday cake intent flagged by re-engaged WhatsApp customer — owner confirms scope before quote.
Office box for 12 from WhatsApp re-engagement campaign — keep the conversation in WA where the broadcast landed.
Same-day cake "Napoleon" pickup — confirm pickup window via WhatsApp since campaign source is WA.

args.adjustment: Trim WhatsApp re-engagement budget by $75 (from $100 to $25) to absorb the $75 budget pressure — this campaign has the lowest ROAS at 11.8x ($1,176 / $100) vs Instagram 14.6x and google_local 13.4x.
args.expectedImpact: Frees $75 with the smallest revenue hit; warm WA list still receives one broadcast at $25 spend.

args.adjustment: Hold $225 on google_local office boxes; route 5.8% click-to-lead leads ($120 AOV, 60% margin = $72 contribution) through a confirmed WhatsApp concierge handoff for groups ≥10.
args.expectedImpact: Maintain projected $3,024 revenue from this channel; tighter handoff lifts office-box close rate without raising spend.

args.adjustment: Hold Instagram family-ritual at $175 — highest ROAS (14.6x) and the required family/celebration campaign; lean creative on cake "Honey" weekend slice rather than custom decoration to keep brand positioning honest.
args.expectedImpact: Preserves $2,562 projected revenue and keeps the brand-voice anchor (ready-made line, not custom).

payload.text: Cake was great but pickup timing was confusing.

payloadPreview.text: Cake was great but pickup timing was confusing.

args.reply:
Hi, friend — thank you for the kind word on the cake, and sorry the pickup timing wasn't clear. That's on us to fix. Here's how pickup works today: when you order, we confirm a pickup window (usually a 30-minute slot) and text you the moment the cake is boxed and ready at the counter. If anything shifts on our side, we message you before the window starts.

If you'd like, reply here with the day you're planning to come by and we'll walk you through the window in plain terms — and have your next slice waiting.

— the HappyCake team
